strategy: Hit with Death. She is Life (resists Life) and takes +30% Death.
Every 3 Rounds, starting Round 1, she braces herself -20% against a random Wizard's school for 4 Rounds. Attack off a school she has not braced, or just burst before it matters at 4,800 health.
She is stunable, so a stun can skip one of her setup turns.
Stack a blade or two, then land one Death hit to finish.
cheatNotes: On Round 1 and every third Round she braces herself -20% against a random Wizard's school for 4 Rounds. Hit off an unbraced school or just burst her down.
